reasoning: The question asks whether the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Saint-Pierre will be higher on specific resolution dates (likely dates in Nov, Dec, Jan, corresponding to winter in the Northern Hemisphere) than on October 26, 2025. Given that Saint-Pierre (either Saint-Pierre-et-Miquelon or a station in France) is in the Northern Hemisphere, temperatures strictly decrease from October through January. The known temperature around Oct 16 was 11°C, and October 26 will likely be around 9-10°C, while November-January temperatures are consistently lower (averaging 0-6°C). The probability of a random January day being warmer than a late October day is very low.
